title: Send notifications of Status Change to subitem person via Slack
excerpt: I am trying to set up a dependency alert via either slack or gmail. I swear I’ve found integrations that should work, but they don’t trigger any alert to either account. Has anyone successfully been able to do this?

posts.author: Bionicgeek (Roy Roberts)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to set up a dependency alert via either slack or gmail. I swear I’ve found integrations that should work, but they don’t trigger any alert to either account. Has anyone successfully been able to do this?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Bionicgeek! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
